metadata.title: AfterActionAI Families & Survivors — Curated Resource Groups
metadata.description: Five hand-curated groups of highest-priority resources for key audience segments

groups.group_name: Gold Star & Surviving Spouse — First Calls
groups.description: The most critical organizations to contact immediately after the loss of a service member. These flagships cover grief support, survivor benefits, housing, and financial relief.
The complete support system for family members caring for a wounded, ill, or injured veteran. Covers stipends, respite, peer support, TBI resources, and mental health.
Top resources for military spouses navigating career challenges, isolation, and frequent moves. Covers scholarships, employment programs, mentoring, and community connection.
Scholarships, grief camps, and support programs specifically designed for the children of fallen, wounded, or serving military members.
Immediate crisis resources and the most important government benefit programs every military family should know. Call these first in an emergency or benefits question.
